changes.title: Tandem garage → Bed 4 + walk-in robe + ensuite
changes.rationale: Largest single lever: 32.4 m² of street-fronting floor area moves the property from the 3b/1b comp pool into 4b/2b in one step.
flags: DA likely — change of use + covered-parking loss (Hornsby DCP)

changes.title: Enclose balcony → new living area, opened to kitchen/dining
changes.rationale: Banks 21.8 m² under the existing roofline and replaces the living amenity the Bed 5 conversion takes.
flags: Structural engineer first — load-bearing wall opening

changes.title: Lounge → Bed 5 (hall strip retained)
changes.rationale: With the enclosed balcony as living space, the lounge converts to a 5th bedroom — the jump into the 5-bed comp band.
flags: Smoke alarms for the extra bedroom

changes.title: Bed 1 second master: hall absorbed, ensuite + WIR
changes.rationale: Two master bedrooms differentiate against every local 5-bed comp.

changes.title: Bed 2 corner walk-in robe
changes.rationale: Owner-directed: walk-in access for Beds 1 and 2.

changes.title: L-bath + second WC
changes.rationale: Second WC pocket behind the existing WC; wet zone reads L-shaped.
flags: On the east wet stack — CDC + waterproofing

changes.title: Butler's pantry, island bench, cabinetry; laundry outside access
changes.rationale: Professional-feel kitchen along the laundry wall.
